papers.title_en: Symbol Rate-Code Rate Trade-offs for IM/DD 200G/400G per Lane LPO Transceivers
papers.authors: José Núñez-Kasaneva, Yunus Can Gültekin, Stefanos Dris, Paraskevas Bakopoulos, Nikos Argyris, Gabriele Liga
papers.evidence: 高速IM/DD LPO收发器的符号率与编码率折衷分析
papers.tldr: 针对200G/400G每通道线性驱动光模块（LPO）中带宽受限的强度调制/直接检测（IM/DD）系统，本文分析了符号率与前向纠错（FEC）码率的最佳权衡。采用PAM-4/6/8调制格式，以二元对称信道容量作为硬判决译码下的可达信息率指标。结果表明，将FEC码率降至KP4基线以下可使高阶PAM格式（PAM-6/8）以显著低于PAM-4的符号率满足吞吐目标，从而有效缓解带宽瓶颈。该权衡分析为LPO收发器的码率与符号率协同优化提供了定量指导，对设计低功耗高速光互连具有重要意义。
papers.abstract_en: We analyze the symbol rate-code rate trade-off in bandwidth-limited IM/DD systems targeting LPO transceivers, using PAM-4/6/8 as candidate modulation formats. We use the capacity of the binary symmetric channel as an achievable information rate under hard-decision decoding, serving as a performance metric for 200G and 400G per-lane throughput targets. Our results show that reducing the FEC code rate below the KP4 baseline allows higher-order PAM formats to operate at substantially lower symbol rates than PAM-4 while meeting the throughput requirement.
